scores.correctness_notes: Core access patterns are correct: event.relation.data[event.unit], relation.units iteration, and app-level databags. Extra content on relation-get hook commands is also accurate. Missing Relation.load() but that is not a correctness error.
scores.hallucination_notes: self.model.get_unit(unit_name) — the ops Model class does not expose a get_unit() method; this appears to be fabricated. Minor inaccuracy rather than a fundamental fabrication, but it does not exist in the framework.
